title: OpenEPCIS Textile DPP Vocabulary
description:
Textile-specific vocabulary extending GS1 Web Vocabulary for Digital Product Passports.

Aligned with:
- EU Strategy for Sustainable and Circular Textiles (COM/2022/141)
- EU Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation (ESPR) 2024/1781
- EU Textile Labelling Regulation 1007/2011
- ISO 3758:2023 (Care labelling)
- GS1 Web Vocabulary (gs1:TextileMaterialDetails pattern)
- GS1 EPCIS 2.0

GS1 Properties to Use (not redefined here):
- gs1:gtin - Global Trade Item Number
- gs1:productName - Product name
- gs1:productDescription - Product description
- gs1:netWeight / gs1:grossWeight - Product weight
- gs1:manufacturer - Manufacturer organization
- gs1:countryOfOrigin - Country of manufacture
- gs1:warranty / gs1:WarrantyPromise - Warranty information
- gs1:certification / gs1:CertificationDetails - Certifications (GOTS, OEKO-TEX, etc.)
- gs1:textileMaterial / gs1:TextileMaterialDetails - Fiber composition (GS1 native)
- gs1:consumerRecyclingInstructions - Recycling text
- gs1:referencedFile - Documents

For fiber composition, prefer gs1:textileMaterial with gs1:TextileMaterialDetails where possible.
Use eutex: extensions for durability metrics, care symbols, and microplastic data not in GS1.

EPCIS 2.0 Extension Declaration:
GS1-Extensions: eutex=https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/eu/textile/

Extension Governance:
This vocabulary extends GS1 Web Vocabulary only where no equivalent term exists.
Each extension term includes dcterms:source, skos:note, and rdfs:seeAlso where applicable.

classes.label: Care Instruction
classes.comment: Care instructions per ISO 3758:2023 including washing, drying, ironing, and dry cleaning symbols.

classes.label: Dimensional Change Test Result
classes.comment:
Dimensional change test result per ISO 3759 after cleaning cycles.
Scoring (woven): >+-4%=0pt, +-3.5-4%=1pt, +-3-3.5%=2pt, <=+-3%=3pt.
Scoring (knitted): >+-6%=0pt, +-5.5-6%=1pt, +-5-5.5%=2pt, <=+-5%=3pt.

classes.label: Durability Information
classes.comment: Product durability metrics including expected lifespan, wash cycles, and usage resistance.

classes.label: Environmental Footprint
classes.comment:
Environmental footprint declaration per EU Preparatory Study 3rd Milestone,
aligned with Product Environmental Footprint Category Rules for Apparel & Footwear (PEFCR A&F).
Includes manufacturing carbon footprint, PEF single score, and benchmark comparison.

classes.label: LCIA Category
classes.comment: Individual Life Cycle Impact Assessment category result within the environmental footprint.

classes.label: Microplastic Information
classes.comment: Information about microplastic/microfiber shedding potential from synthetic textiles.

classes.label: Recyclability Assessment
classes.comment:
Recyclability assessment per EU Preparatory Study 3rd Milestone.
Score 0-10 based on: elastane content threshold (>15% or >20% for PA6-rich >80% blends makes product
non-recyclable, score 0), sorting factors (same composition inner/outer, free from printings,
free from coatings, free from sequins, free from dyes, mono-material), and
technical recyclability of the applicable recycling technology.

classes.label: Recycled Content Declaration
classes.comment:
Structured recycled content declaration per EU Preparatory Study 3rd Milestone.
Captures secondary material fraction, waste origin type (post-consumer/post-industrial),
recycled source type (fiber-to-fiber/open loop), and chain of custody method.

classes.label: Robustness Assessment
classes.comment:
Composite robustness assessment per EU Preparatory Study 3rd Milestone.
Score 0-10 based on three test parameters measured after 5 cleaning cycles (ISO 6330):
spirality (0-3 pts), dimensional change (0-3 pts), and visual inspection (0-4 pts).
Thresholds differ by fabric type (knitted vs woven).

classes.label: Sorting Factors
classes.comment:
Sorting factors affecting recyclability score. Each factor satisfied adds 1 point:
same composition inner/outer, free from printings, free from coatings, free from sequins,
free from dyes, mono-material.

classes.label: Spirality Test Result
classes.comment:
Spirality test result per ISO 16322-3 after cleaning cycles.
Scoring (woven): >6%=0pt, 5.5-6%=1pt, 5-5.5%=2pt, <=5%=3pt.
Scoring (knitted): >7%=0pt, 6-7%=1pt, 5-6%=2pt, <=5%=3pt.

classes.label: Substance of Concern
classes.comment:
A substance of concern present in the textile product, classified per ESPR Article 7(5)
into 4 types: Type A (SVHC per REACH), Type B (CLP hazard), Type C (POPs),
Type D (substances hindering reuse/recycling).

classes.label: Take-Back Program
classes.comment: End-of-life collection and take-back program information for circular textile economy.

classes.label: Technical Recyclability
classes.comment: Technical recyclability assessment based on the applicable recycling technology.

classes.label: Textile Apparel
classes.comment:
A clothing textile product as defined by EU Textile Labelling Regulation 1007/2011.
Dual inheritance bridges the OpenEPCIS textile vocabulary with the GS1 WearableProduct
hierarchy: instances are both gs1:Product (DPP properties) and gs1:Clothing
(GS1 interoperability). Includes outerwear, underwear, sportswear, and workwear.

classes.label: Textile Footwear
classes.comment:
A footwear product containing textile materials, per EU Textile Labelling Regulation.
Dual inheritance bridges the OpenEPCIS textile vocabulary with the GS1 WearableProduct
hierarchy: instances are both gs1:Product (DPP properties) and gs1:Footwear
(GS1 interoperability). Includes shoes, boots, sandals, and other textile footwear.

classes.label: Visual Inspection Result
classes.comment:
Visual inspection result per ISO 15487 after cleaning cycles.
Score 0-4 pts based on sub-ratings (1-5 scale each) for colour change,
fabric appearance, seam appearance, and non-textile parts condition.

properties.label: Abrasion Resistance
properties.comment: Abrasion resistance in Martindale cycles.

properties.label: Additional Care Instructions
properties.comment: Additional care instructions in text form.

properties.label: Apparel Subcategory
properties.comment: The specific apparel subcategory per EU Preparatory Study classification.

properties.label: Applicable Recycling Technology
properties.comment: The recycling technology applicable to this product based on its fiber composition.

properties.label: Benchmark Performance
properties.comment: Performance relative to product category benchmark as percentage (negative = better than benchmark).

properties.label: Biodegradable
properties.comment: Whether the product is biodegradable at end of life.

properties.label: Bleaching Symbol
properties.comment: ISO 3758 bleaching care symbol.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Class
properties.comment: Discrete performance class (A–G style band, expressed as an integer 1..n) for the manufacturing carbon footprint relative to the PEFCR climate-change benchmark.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Manufacturing
properties.comment: Carbon footprint of manufacturing phase in kg CO2-eq per product unit.

properties.label: Care Instructions
properties.comment: Care and maintenance instructions for the textile product.

properties.label: Chain of Custody Method
properties.comment: Chain of custody method used to verify the recycled content claim.

properties.label: Chemical Purpose
properties.comment: Purpose of the chemical (dye, finish, water-repellent treatment, etc.).

properties.label: Cleaning Cycles Before Test
properties.comment: Number of cleaning cycles performed before testing (default 5 per EU methodology).

properties.label: CLP Hazard Category
properties.comment: CLP hazard category classification (applicable to Type B substances).

properties.label: Color Fastness
properties.comment: Color fastness rating (1-5 per ISO 105, where 5 is best).

properties.label: Colour Change Rating
properties.comment: Colour change sub-rating (1-5 per ISO 15487, where 5 is no change).

properties.label: Concentration Range
properties.comment: Concentration range as text (e.g. '0.01-0.05% w/w') when exact value is confidential.

properties.label: Contains Non-Textile Parts of Animal Origin
properties.comment: Whether the product contains non-textile parts of animal origin, per the Textile Labelling Regulation (EU) 1007/2011 Article 12.

properties.label: Cut and Sew Facility
properties.comment: Facility where garment was cut and assembled.

properties.label: Data Type Indicator
properties.comment: Type of data used in the footprint calculation (primary, secondary, or mixed).

properties.label: Dimensional Change Percentage
properties.comment: Measured dimensional change as percentage (absolute value) after cleaning cycles.

properties.label: Dimensional Change Score
properties.comment: Dimensional change component score (0-3 points).

properties.label: Dimensional Change Test
properties.comment: Dimensional change test result component of robustness assessment.

properties.label: Dimensional Change Test Method
properties.comment: Test method reference (e.g. ISO 3759).

properties.label: Dimensional Stability
properties.comment: Maximum dimensional change (shrinkage/stretch) as percentage after washing.

properties.label: Dry Cleaning Symbol
properties.comment: ISO 3758 dry cleaning care symbol.

properties.label: Drying Symbol
properties.comment: ISO 3758 drying care symbol.

properties.label: Durability Class
properties.comment: Durability rating class (A-E).

properties.label: Durability Information
properties.comment: Durability metrics for the textile product.

properties.label: Dyeing Facility
properties.comment: Facility where fabric was dyed or printed.

properties.label: EC Number
properties.comment: European Community number (EINECS/ELINCS).

properties.label: Elastane Content Percent
properties.comment: Elastane/spandex content as percentage of total weight. Content >15% (>20% for PA6-rich >80% blends) makes product non-recyclable (score 0).

properties.label: End of Life Destination
properties.comment: What happens to collected items (recycled, upcycled, resold, donated).

properties.label: End of Life Handling
properties.comment: Special handling instructions for end-of-life treatment due to the substance of concern.

properties.label: Energy Usage
properties.comment: Energy consumed in production. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with KWH unit.

properties.label: Environmental Footprint
properties.comment: Environmental footprint declaration for the textile product.

properties.label: Environmental Footprint Class
properties.comment: Discrete performance class (A–G style band, expressed as an integer 1..n) for the PEF single score relative to the product-category benchmark.

properties.label: EU Declaration of Conformity
properties.comment: Reference to the product's EU Declaration of Conformity under the ESPR textile delegated act. Reuse oec:DocumentReference.

properties.label: EU Ecolabel
properties.comment: Whether the product carries the EU Ecolabel (Regulation (EC) 66/2010).

properties.label: Expected Lifetime Years
properties.comment: Expected product lifetime in years under normal use.

properties.label: Expected Wash Cycles
properties.comment: Expected number of wash cycles before significant degradation.

properties.label: Fabric Appearance Rating
properties.comment: Fabric surface appearance sub-rating (1-5 per ISO 15487, where 5 is no change).

properties.label: Fabric Type
properties.comment: The fabric construction type of the textile product.

properties.label: Fiber Certification
properties.comment: Certification specific to this fiber (GOTS, RWS, etc.). Use gs1:CertificationDetails pattern.

properties.label: Fiber Origin
properties.comment: Country or region of fiber origin (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code).

properties.label: Finishing Facility
properties.comment: Facility where finishing treatments were applied.

properties.label: Free From Coatings
properties.comment: Whether the product is free from non-removable coatings (+1 pt if true).

properties.label: Free From Dyes
properties.comment: Whether the product is free from dyes (+1 pt if true).

properties.label: Free From Printings
properties.comment: Whether the product is free from non-removable printings (+1 pt if true).

properties.label: Free From Sequins
properties.comment: Whether the product is free from sequins, beads, and non-textile embellishments (+1 pt if true).

properties.label: Garment Type
properties.comment: Specific type of garment (jacket, trousers, shirt, etc.).

properties.label: Has Take-Back Program
properties.comment: Whether a take-back program is available for this product.

properties.label: Ironing Symbol
properties.comment: ISO 3758 ironing care symbol.

properties.label: Is Mono-Material
properties.comment: Whether the product is made of a single fiber type (+1 pt if true). Mono-material products are more likely to be recycled.

properties.label: Is MRSL Compliant
properties.comment: Whether the chemical complies with ZDHC Manufacturing Restricted Substances List.

properties.label: Is Recyclable
properties.comment: Whether the product is considered recyclable (score above minimum threshold).

properties.label: Is Recycled Fiber
properties.comment: Indicates whether this fiber is from recycled sources.

properties.label: Is Repairable
properties.comment: Whether the product is designed to be repairable.

properties.label: LCIA Categories
properties.comment: Individual LCIA category results within the environmental footprint.

properties.label: LCIA Category Code
properties.comment: The impact category code.

properties.label: LCIA Unit
properties.comment: Unit of the LCIA value (e.g. 'kg CO2-eq', 'm3 world-eq', 'mol H+-eq').

properties.label: LCIA Value
properties.comment: The impact category value in the category-specific unit.

properties.label: Location in Product
properties.comment: Where in the product the substance is located (e.g. 'shell fabric', 'dye', 'water-repellent finish').

properties.label: Maximum Concentration
properties.comment: Maximum concentration of the substance as percentage by weight.

properties.label: Meets Target Threshold
properties.comment: Whether the recycled content meets the regulatory target threshold for this product category.

properties.label: Microplastic Information
properties.comment: Information about microfiber shedding from synthetic textiles.

properties.label: Microplastic Mitigation Measures
properties.comment: Description of measures taken to reduce microplastic shedding.

properties.label: Microplastic Risk Level
properties.comment: Risk classification for microfiber shedding.

properties.label: Non-Textile Parts Rating
properties.comment: Non-textile parts condition sub-rating (1-5 per ISO 15487, where 5 is no change).

properties.label: Organic Content Mass
properties.comment: Mass of certified organic fibre content (grams), per Regulation (EU) 2018/848.

properties.label: Organic Content Percentage
properties.comment: Share of certified organic fibre content by mass (%), per Regulation (EU) 2018/848.

properties.label: PEFCR Reference
properties.comment: Reference to the applicable PEFCR version (e.g. 'PEFCR Apparel & Footwear v1.3').

properties.label: PEF Single Score
properties.comment: Product Environmental Footprint single score in milli-points (mPt) per PEFCR A&F methodology.

properties.label: PFAS Free
properties.comment: Whether the product is free from per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS).

properties.label: Pilling Resistance
properties.comment: Pilling resistance rating (1-5 per ISO 12945, where 5 is best).

properties.label: Production Waste Percentage
properties.comment: Percentage of material waste during production.

properties.label: Recyclability Assessment
properties.comment: Recyclability assessment for the textile product.

properties.label: Recyclability Score
properties.comment: Composite recyclability score (0-10).

properties.label: Recycled Content Declaration
properties.comment: Structured recycled content declaration for the textile product or fiber.

properties.label: Recycled Content Source
properties.comment: Source of recycled content (e.g. post-consumer PET bottles, ocean plastic, post-industrial textile waste).

properties.label: Recycled Source Type
properties.comment: Type of recycling pathway.

properties.label: Repair Guide URL
properties.comment: URL to repair/care guide for DIY repairs.

properties.label: Repair Services
properties.comment: Information about available repair services.

properties.label: Robustness Assessment
properties.comment: Robustness assessment for the textile product.

properties.label: Robustness Score
properties.comment: Composite robustness score (0-10). Sum of spirality (0-3), dimensional change (0-3), and visual inspection (0-4).

properties.label: Robustness Test Fabric Type
properties.comment: Fabric type used to determine test thresholds (knitted vs woven scoring tables differ).

properties.label: Safe Use Instructions
properties.comment: Instructions for safe use of the product considering the substance of concern.

properties.label: Same Inner/Outer Composition
properties.comment: Whether inner and outer fabric layers have the same fiber composition (+1 pt if true).

properties.label: Seam Appearance Rating
properties.comment: Seam appearance sub-rating (1-5 per ISO 15487, where 5 is no change).

properties.label: Season Collection
properties.comment: Season and year of the collection (e.g., FW2024, SS2025).

properties.label: Secondary Material Fraction
properties.comment: Percentage of secondary (recycled) material by weight.

properties.label: Shedding Rate
properties.comment: Microfiber shedding rate per wash. Use unitCode 'MGM' (mg/kg, UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Size Range
properties.comment: Available size range (e.g., XS-XXL, 36-52).

properties.label: SoC Type
properties.comment: The ESPR Article 7(5) type classification (A, B, C, or D).

properties.label: Sorting Factors
properties.comment: Sorting factors assessment for recyclability.

properties.label: Spare Parts Available
properties.comment: Whether spare parts (buttons, zippers, etc.) are available for purchase.

properties.label: Spare Parts URL
properties.comment: URL to purchase spare parts.

properties.label: Spinning Facility
properties.comment: Facility where fiber was spun into yarn.

properties.label: Spirality Percentage
properties.comment: Measured spirality as percentage after cleaning cycles.

properties.label: Spirality Score
properties.comment: Spirality component score (0-3 points).

properties.label: Spirality Test
properties.comment: Spirality test result component of robustness assessment.

properties.label: Spirality Test Method
properties.comment: Test method reference (e.g. ISO 16322-3).

properties.label: Substance Concentration
properties.comment: Concentration of the substance in the product as percentage by weight (w/w).

properties.label: Substances of Concern
properties.comment: Substances of concern present in the textile product per ESPR Article 7(5).

properties.label: Synthetic Fiber Content
properties.comment: Total percentage of synthetic fibers that may shed microplastics.

properties.label: Take-Back Incentive
properties.comment: Description of incentive for returning products (discount, voucher, etc.).

properties.label: Take-Back Program
properties.comment: End-of-life take-back program information.

properties.label: Take-Back URL
properties.comment: URL with take-back program information and collection points.

properties.label: Tear Strength
properties.comment: Fabric tear strength. Use unitCode 'NEW' (newtons, UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Technical Recyclability
properties.comment: Technical recyclability assessment for the product.

properties.label: Technical Recyclability Score
properties.comment: Technical recyclability component score based on applicable recycling technology.

properties.label: Tensile Strength
properties.comment: Fabric tensile strength. Use unitCode 'NEW' (newtons, UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Test Standard
properties.comment: The test standard used for a durability or robustness test.

properties.label: Textile Chemicals
properties.comment: Chemical substances used in the production of this textile product.

properties.label: Textile Fibre Scientific Name
properties.comment: Scientific (binomial) name of a textile fibre, e.g. "Gossypium hirsutum" for cotton, required alongside the common fibre name for certain fibres under the EU Textile Labelling Regulation.

properties.label: Verification Certification
properties.comment: Third-party certification verifying the recycled content claim. Use gs1:CertificationDetails pattern.

properties.label: Visual Inspection
properties.comment: Visual inspection result component of robustness assessment.

properties.label: Visual Inspection Score
properties.comment: Visual inspection component score (0-4 points).

properties.label: Visual Inspection Test Method
properties.comment: Test method reference (e.g. ISO 15487).

properties.label: Washing Symbol
properties.comment: ISO 3758 washing care symbol.

properties.label: Waste Origin Type
properties.comment: Origin classification of the recycled waste material.

properties.label: Water Usage
properties.comment: Water consumed in production. Use unitCode 'LTR' (liters, UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Weaving Facility
properties.comment: Facility where yarn was woven or knitted into fabric.

properties.label: Weight Excluding Trims
properties.comment: Product weight excluding trims and accessories (grams), used for recycled/organic content denominators. Use gs1:netWeight for the total product weight.

enumerations.label: Apparel Subcategory
enumerations.comment:
Apparel product subcategories per EU Preparatory Study on Textiles 3rd Milestone.
Used for targeted recycled content thresholds and recyclability requirements.

values.label: Dresses & Skirts
values.comment: Dresses, skirts, and jumpsuits.

values.label: Jackets & Coats
values.comment: Outerwear including jackets, coats, blazers, and vests.

values.label: Leggings, Stockings & Socks
values.comment: Legwear including leggings, tights, stockings, and socks.

values.label: Pants & Shorts
values.comment: Trousers, jeans, shorts, and skorts.

values.label: Shirts & Blouses
values.comment: Woven shirts, blouses, and formal tops.

values.label: Sweaters
values.comment: Knitted pullovers, cardigans, and sweaters.

values.label: Swimwear
values.comment: Swimming and bathing garments.

values.label: Textile Accessories
values.comment: Textile accessories including scarves, gloves, hats, and ties.

values.label: T-Shirts
values.comment: Short-sleeved casual tops including t-shirts and polo shirts.

values.label: Underwear
values.comment: Undergarments and intimate apparel.

enumerations.label: Care Symbol Code
enumerations.comment: Care symbols per ISO 3758:2023 for textile care labelling.

values.label: Bleach Allowed
values.comment: Any bleach allowed.

values.label: Do Not Bleach
values.comment: Do not bleach.

values.label: Do Not Dry Clean
values.comment: Do not dry clean.

values.label: Do Not Iron
values.comment: Do not iron.

values.label: Do Not Tumble Dry
values.comment: Do not tumble dry.

values.label: Do Not Wash
values.comment: Do not wash.

values.label: Drip Dry
values.comment: Drip dry without wringing.

values.label: Dry Clean Any Solvent
values.comment: Dry clean with any solvent.

values.label: Dry Clean Hydrocarbon
values.comment: Dry clean with hydrocarbon solvents only.

values.label: Dry Clean PCE
values.comment: Dry clean with tetrachloroethylene (PCE).

values.label: Dry Flat
values.comment: Dry flat.

values.label: Iron High
values.comment: Iron at high temperature (max 200C).

values.label: Iron Low
values.comment: Iron at low temperature (max 110C).

values.label: Iron Medium
values.comment: Iron at medium temperature (max 150C).

values.label: Line Dry
values.comment: Line dry / hang to dry.

values.label: Non-Chlorine Bleach
values.comment: Only non-chlorine/oxygen bleach allowed.

values.label: No Steam
values.comment: Iron without steam.

values.label: Tumble Dry High
values.comment: Tumble dry at high temperature.

values.label: Tumble Dry Low
values.comment: Tumble dry at low temperature.

values.label: Tumble Dry Medium
values.comment: Tumble dry at medium temperature.

values.label: Wash 30C
values.comment: Machine wash at maximum 30C.

values.label: Wash 40C
values.comment: Machine wash at maximum 40C.

values.label: Wash 60C
values.comment: Machine wash at maximum 60C.

values.label: Gentle Wash
values.comment: Gentle/delicate wash cycle.

values.label: Hand Wash Only
values.comment: Hand wash only, maximum 40C.

values.label: Professional Wet Clean
values.comment: Professional wet cleaning.

enumerations.label: Chain of Custody Method
enumerations.comment: Chain of custody method used to verify recycled content claims.

values.label: Certified
values.comment: Third-party certified chain of custody (e.g. GRS, RCS).

values.label: Identity Preserved
values.comment: Identity preserved method with full physical traceability from source to product.

values.label: Mass Balance
values.comment: Mass balance accounting method where recycled and virgin inputs are tracked by quantity.

values.label: Segregation
values.comment: Segregation method where recycled materials are kept physically separate from virgin.

enumerations.label: CLP Hazard Category
enumerations.comment: CLP Regulation hazard categories relevant to textile substances of concern (Type B).

values.label: Aquatic Toxicity
values.comment: Hazardous to the aquatic environment (acute or chronic).

values.label: CMR
values.comment: Carcinogenic, Mutagenic, or toxic to Reproduction (categories 1A, 1B, 2).

values.label: Endocrine Disruptor
values.comment: Endocrine disrupting substance per EU criteria.

values.label: PMT
values.comment: Persistent, Mobile, and Toxic or very Persistent, very Mobile (PMT/vPvM).

values.label: Sensitizer
values.comment: Skin or respiratory sensitiser.

values.label: Durability Class A
values.comment: Highest durability - designed for extended lifetime (>200 wash cycles, >10 years).

values.label: Durability Class B
values.comment: High durability (100-200 wash cycles, 5-10 years).

values.label: Durability Class C
values.comment: Standard durability (50-100 wash cycles, 3-5 years).

values.label: Durability Class D
values.comment: Below average durability (25-50 wash cycles, 1-3 years).

values.label: Durability Class E
values.comment: Low durability (<25 wash cycles, <1 year). Single-use or disposable items.

enumerations.label: Fabric Type
enumerations.comment:
Fabric construction type that determines robustness thresholds, recyclability scoring,
and recycled content targets per EU Preparatory Study on Textiles 3rd Milestone.

values.label: Denim
values.comment: Twill-woven fabric typically made from cotton, characterised by indigo dyeing.

values.label: Knitted
values.comment: Fabric constructed by interlocking loops of yarn (jersey, rib, interlock, etc.).

values.label: Woven Non-Denim
values.comment: Woven fabric other than denim (plain weave, twill, satin, etc.).

enumerations.label: Fiber Type
enumerations.comment: Fiber types as defined in EU Textile Labelling Regulation 1007/2011 Annex I.

values.label: Acrylic
values.comment: Synthetic fiber made from acrylonitrile polymers.

values.label: Cashmere
values.comment: Fine natural fiber from cashmere goat undercoat.

values.label: Cotton
values.comment: Natural cellulose fiber from cotton plant (Gossypium).

values.label: Elastane
values.comment: Synthetic elastic fiber (spandex/Lycra) for stretch fabrics.

values.label: Hemp
values.comment: Natural cellulose fiber from hemp plant (Cannabis sativa).

values.label: Leather
values.comment: Animal hide material (not a textile fiber but used in footwear composition).

values.label: Linen
values.comment: Natural cellulose fiber from flax plant (Linum usitatissimum).

values.label: Lyocell
values.comment: Regenerated cellulose fiber using closed-loop solvent process (Tencel).

values.label: Modal
values.comment: Regenerated cellulose fiber from beech wood pulp.

values.label: Organic Cotton
values.comment: Cotton grown without synthetic pesticides or fertilizers per organic standards.

values.label: Polyamide
values.comment: Synthetic fiber (nylon) made from polyamide polymers.

values.label: Polyester
values.comment: Synthetic fiber made from polyethylene terephthalate (PET).

values.label: Polypropylene
values.comment: Synthetic thermoplastic fiber for technical applications.

values.label: Recycled Cotton
values.comment: Cotton fiber reclaimed from pre-consumer or post-consumer textile waste.

values.label: Recycled Polyester
values.comment: Polyester fiber made from recycled PET bottles or textile waste.

values.label: Recycled Wool
values.comment: Wool fiber reclaimed from pre-consumer or post-consumer textile waste.

values.label: Rubber
values.comment: Natural or synthetic rubber material (used in footwear soles).

values.label: Silk
values.comment: Natural protein fiber from silkworm cocoons.

values.label: Viscose
values.comment: Regenerated cellulose fiber from wood pulp (rayon).

values.label: Wool
values.comment: Natural protein fiber from sheep or lamb fleece.

enumerations.label: Footprint Data Type
enumerations.comment: Type of data used in the environmental footprint calculation.

values.label: Mixed Data
values.comment: Footprint based on a combination of primary and secondary data sources.

values.label: Primary Data
values.comment: Footprint based on primary (company-specific) data from actual production processes.

values.label: Secondary Data
values.comment: Footprint based on secondary (generic/database) data from LCI databases.

enumerations.label: LCIA Category Code
enumerations.comment: Life Cycle Impact Assessment category codes per PEF methodology.

values.label: Acidification
values.comment: Acidification impact category (mol H+-eq).

values.label: Ecotoxicity
values.comment: Freshwater ecotoxicity impact category (CTUe).

values.label: Eutrophication
values.comment: Freshwater eutrophication impact category (kg P-eq).

values.label: Global Warming Potential
values.comment: Climate change impact category (kg CO2-eq).

values.label: Human Toxicity
values.comment: Human toxicity (cancer + non-cancer) impact category (CTUh).

values.label: Water Use
values.comment: Water scarcity footprint impact category (m3 world-eq).

enumerations.label: Microplastic Risk Level
enumerations.comment: Risk classification for microplastic/microfiber shedding from textiles.

values.label: High Shedding
values.comment: High microfiber shedding risk (> 500 mg/kg per wash). Fleece, chenille, or cut-pile synthetics.

values.label: Low Shedding
values.comment: Low microfiber shedding risk (< 50 mg/kg per wash). Natural fibers or tightly woven synthetics.

values.label: Medium Shedding
values.comment: Medium microfiber shedding risk (50-500 mg/kg per wash). Typical synthetic fabrics.

enumerations.label: Recycled Source Type
enumerations.comment: Type of recycling pathway for the recycled content.

values.label: Fiber-to-Fiber
values.comment: Closed-loop recycling where textile waste is recycled back into textile fibers.

values.label: Open Loop
values.comment: Open-loop recycling where non-textile waste (e.g. PET bottles) is converted into textile fibers.

enumerations.label: Recycling Technology
enumerations.comment: Applicable recycling technologies per EU Preparatory Study 3rd Milestone.

values.label: Chemical Recycling (Cotton)
values.comment: Chemical recycling process for cellulosic/cotton fibers (e.g. dissolution-regeneration).

values.label: Chemical Recycling (PA6)
values.comment: Chemical recycling for polyamide 6 (depolymerisation to caprolactam).

values.label: Mechanical Recycling
values.comment: Mechanical fiber recycling through shredding and re-spinning.

values.label: Thermo-Chemical Recycling
values.comment: Thermo-chemical treatment to recover cotton from cotton-rich blends (>60%).

values.label: Thermo-Mechanical Recycling
values.comment: Thermo-mechanical recycling through melting and re-extrusion of thermoplastic fibers.

enumerations.label: Substance of Concern Type
enumerations.comment: The 4-type classification of substances of concern per ESPR Article 7(5).

values.label: SoC Type A - SVHC
values.comment: Substances of Very High Concern per REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006, with 0.1% w/w threshold.

values.label: SoC Type B - CLP Hazard
values.comment: Substances classified under CLP Regulation 1272/2008 with hazard classifications (CMR, ED, PMT, sensitiser, aquatic toxicity).

values.label: SoC Type C - POPs
values.comment: Persistent Organic Pollutants per EU Regulation 2019/1021 (recast of Stockholm Convention obligations).

values.label: SoC Type D - Recycling Hindrance
values.comment: Substances that hinder reuse or recycling of the product at end of life.

enumerations.label: Test Standard
enumerations.comment: Test standards referenced in the EU Preparatory Study for textile robustness and durability testing.

values.label: ISO 105
values.comment: Textiles - Tests for colour fastness (multi-part standard).

values.label: ISO 12945
values.comment: Textiles - Determination of fabric propensity to surface pilling, fuzzing or matting.

values.label: ISO 12947
values.comment: Textiles - Determination of the abrasion resistance of fabrics by the Martindale method.

values.label: ISO 15487
values.comment: Textiles - Method for assessing the appearance of apparel and other textile end products after domestic washing and drying.

values.label: ISO 16322-3
values.comment: Textiles - Determination of spirality after laundering - Part 3: Woven and knitted garments.

values.label: ISO 3759
values.comment: Textiles - Preparation, marking and measuring of fabric specimens and garments in tests for determination of dimensional change.

values.label: ISO 6330
values.comment: Textiles - Domestic washing and drying procedures for textile testing.

enumerations.label: Textile Category
enumerations.comment: Categories of textile products per EU Textile Labelling Regulation.

values.label: Accessories
values.comment: Textile accessories including bags, belts, scarves, and hats.

values.label: Apparel
values.comment: Clothing items including outerwear, underwear, sportswear, and workwear.

values.label: Footwear
values.comment: Shoes, boots, sandals, and other footwear containing textile materials.

values.label: Home Textiles
values.comment: Household textile products including bedding, towels, curtains, and upholstery.

values.label: Technical Textiles
values.comment: Functional textiles for industrial, medical, protective, or automotive applications.

enumerations.label: Waste Origin Type
enumerations.comment: Origin classification of recycled waste material.

values.label: Post-Consumer
values.comment: Waste generated by end consumers after product use.

values.label: Post-Industrial
values.comment: Waste generated during manufacturing processes (pre-consumer).
